entryPointCandidates.name: index.html
entryPointCandidates.summary: Single-page wedding invitation entry point for Hani and Amrul featuring inline config (RSVP, music, layouts), Alsa template sections, CDN plugins, and embedded media references.

entryPointCandidates.name: universal.js
entryPointCandidates.summary: Core application JavaScript with shared UI helpers, AJAX posting, form widgets, and document-ready event bindings for the wedding site.

documentation.name: 01_TECHNICAL_BASELINE.md
documentation.summary: Establishes the static wedding-invitation technical baseline: stack (HTML/jQuery/plugins), asset flow without a build step, folder map, runtime smoke-test results, functional features to preserve, and audit scope limitations.

documentation.name: 02_ASSET_INVENTORY.md
documentation.summary: Catalogs 191 local assets (33.01 MiB) across media, plugin, public/dist, and src with per-group reference tracing, duplicate status, confidence ratings, and inventory exclusion rules.

documentation.name: 03_BROKEN_AND_MISSING_ASSETS.md
documentation.summary: Documents confirmed broken and missing assets including Orn-64.png, incomplete lightGallery distribution, missing html2canvas source map, stale commented template script, and root-relative URL deployment risk.

documentation.name: 04_UNUSED_AND_DUPLICATE_FINDINGS.md
documentation.summary: Lists high-confidence unused asset, duplicate-hash, dead-code, and unused-dependency candidates with evidence, removal risk, and SHA-256 duplicate groups; no deletions performed by the audit.

documentation.name: 05_CDN_MIGRATION_ANALYSIS.md
documentation.summary: Evaluates each CDN and local library dependency with conservative migration recommendations, prioritizing KEEP_LOCAL for critical plugins and pinning/SRI hardening for unpinned third-party URLs.

documentation.name: 06_FINDINGS_REGISTER.md
documentation.summary: Consolidated findings register merging asset, dead-code, CDN security, and metadata issues with severity, evidence, user impact, risk, and confidence for each tracked finding ID.

documentation.name: 07_REMEDIATION_PLAN.md
documentation.summary: Defines seven isolated PR phases from smoke-test baseline through asset repair, dead-file removal, CDN hardening, optional build pipeline, and final validation with explicit scope and rollback rules.

documentation.name: 08_EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md
documentation.summary: Executive verdict that bulk deletion and CDN migration are not ready; recommends safety-net PR, two targeted asset repairs, ordered quick wins, and lists unsafe areas requiring extra evidence before change.
